title: BulkApplyCaseTagListRequest
description: Schema for BulkApplyCaseTagListRequest in Nuix REST API

tagList.description: List of tags used during the operation.  The tag list is optional for a `RENAME` operation.

renameMap.description: A map of tags where the key is the current tag name and the value is the new tag name.

operationType.description: The operation to perform on the tag.
